content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop for improving raw outputs can be structurally enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break out of local optimization traps that single-perspective self-refinement often falls into. This creates a two-layer self-improvement system where outer-layer iterative refinement is guided by inner-layer cross-perspective contradiction detection, without requiring any additional supervised training or external data.
